patch.value: CONTEXT: could adopt @modelcontextprotocol/sdk for protocol compliance/resources/prompts. DECISION: keep a ~842-LOC hand-written JSON-RPC server: zero added dependency on a startup-critical path, all needed methods (initialize/tools/list/tools/call) are stable, the server is a thin shim over the pm runner, and the team can adapt to protocol changes without waiting on SDK releases. CONSEQUENCES: tiny binary, full control; protocol bumps and new methods (resources/prompts/ping/logging) are manual; needs handshake test coverage (pm-kl11). EVIDENCE: src/mcp/server.ts (protocolVersion 2025-06-18, capabilities {tools}).
ADR: Hand-rolled dependency-free MCP server (JSON-RPC over stdio)
Hand-rolled dependency-free MCP server (JSON-RPC over stdio)
ADR recorded and accepted; architectural decision documented as durable context on 2026-05-31.
Accepted ADR recorded in living map
The ADR captures a durable architecture or operating decision with context, consequences, and evidence for future agents.
The closed Decision 'ADR: Hand-rolled dependency-free MCP server (JSON-RPC over stdio)' is recorded under the ADR living log and preserved as durable project context.
